description: Josephine Migalbin - Josephine Rabanal Migalbin is a visiting scholar at UC Davis, studying the effects of climate change on agriculture. Today on Insight, she’ll tell us about her work, as well as daily life for Christians and Muslims living together in the Philippines. Richard Powers - His novels deal with such topics as artificial intelligence, genetics and neurology, the product of his own lifelong interest in science. Pop-up Book Designer - David Carter David Carter is the author of 75 pop-up books. His pop-up adaptation of the popular Dr. Seuss story, Horton Hears a Who, is published in conjunction with the release of the long-awaited animated feature film of the same name.
